overall.description: A cinematic view of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter-style video game, showcasing a vast gothic dining hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students sit at long wooden tables beneath towering stone arches and massive stained glass windows, while a translucent ghostly figure floats in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

agents.ego_description: standing at the rear of the great hall looking down the central aisle toward the stained glass windows

notable_agents.action: translucent ghost figure floating stationary near the camera

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
rows of long wooden tables filled with students in dark robes

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady cinematic view of a magnificent gothic great hall illuminated by countless floating candles. Students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables on either side of a central marble aisle, while massive stained glass windows dominate the far wall. A translucent ghostly NPC floats in the right foreground, and the warm candlelight creates a magical atmosphere throughout the stone-arched hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a magnificent gothic great hall where magical illumination defines the atmosphere. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the stone-arched interior, with countless floating candles casting a warm glow over students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. As the view lingers, the perspective emphasizes the contrast between the central marble aisle and the massive stained glass windows that dominate the far wall. The scene remains focused on this grand vista, with a translucent ghostly figure floating in the right foreground to add a layer of ethereal depth to the magical setting.
